sections.paragraph: ἀπιστία, ας, ἡ [ἄπιστος] ‘refusal to give credence (to)’, lack of faith, unbelief, of lack of willingness to respond positively to words or actions that invite belief or commitment Mt 13:58; Mk 6:6; 9:24; 16:14; Ro 3:3 (here with focus on commitment); 4:20; 11:20, 23; 1 Ti 1:13; Hb 3:19; καρδία πονηρὰ ἀπιστίας base unbelieving heart vs. 12.
